THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL FORECLOSURE RELATED MATTERS PURSUANT TO SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. JUDGE: NEWTON LAM; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: REYES F. HUNTER, CSR#6576, E-MAIL: RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG. [302]

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 1/9/18) DEFENDANT ZIEVE, BRODNAX & STEELE LLP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN PART AND MOOT IN PART. DEMURRER IS MOOT AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND COSTS. SEE RULING ON MOTION TO STRIKE. DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR STATUTORY VIOLATION AND FOR CONVERSION IS OVERRULED. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES AN OVERCHARGE, WHETHER THE OVERCHARGE IS BASED ON THE "CAPPED" AMOUNT OR ON REASONABLENESS OF THE ACTUAL FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN THE PRE AND POST FORECLOSURE STAGES IS AN ISSUE OF FACT NOT PROPERLY ADDRESSED ON DEMURRER; ADDITIONALLY WHETHER PARTICULAR FEES AND COSTS ARE SUBJECT TO "CAP" IS ALSO AN ISSUE OF FACT. SEE CARUSO V. GREAT WESTERN SAVINGS (1991) 229 CAL.APP.3D 667. ("WHETHER A PARTICULAR EXPENSE MAY BE TREATED AS AN ADVANCE, OR IS SUBJECT TO THE LIMITATIONS IN CIVIL CODE SECTION 2924C, WILL DEPEND UPON THE PURPOSE FOR WHICH THE EXPENSE WAS INCURRED AND THE PARTICULAR CONTRACTUAL TERMS INVOLVED." (212 CAL.APP.3D AT P. 421, ITALICS ADDED.) - DEFENDANT TO PREPARE ORDER IN CONFORMITY WITH TENTATIVE RULING.

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Needs, (714)848-7920 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Zieve, Brodnaz & Steele LLP. (via Court call)
Aaron Blum, (307)690-7286) for Plainitff/Moving party Randolph Scott.

Argued by Plaintiff. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ZIEVE, BRODNAX & STEELE LLP MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED without leave to amend. Plaintiffs fail to allege facts in support of punitive damages. The following paragraphs in Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint are stricken: Paragraphs 36 through 42; paragraphs 49 through 53; and paragraph 61. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
